◎译　　名　暴力 / Violence

◎年　　代　2015

◎简　　介  

　　Cicadas and birdsong, a black screen, the jungle floor coming into view at the start of day. A leisurely tracking shot: roots, moss, a metal chain, a sleeping man shackled, hands clasped together, feet caked in mud. A silent captive whose captors’ faces remain unseen, a daily routine in the forest as helicopters rumble above.Pleasurable moans in a dark bedroom, a white curtain...
